headline: Why Is Estée Lauder (EL) Stock Rocketing Higher Today
summary: Shares of beauty products company Estée Lauder (NYSE:EL) jumped 11.4% in the afternoon session after the company and Spanish beauty conglomerate Puig confirmed they ended merger talks.
